Deploying a deep learning model on AWS requires careful planning and execution. * * *  
Model training and validation are performed on AWS EC2 instances, ensuring computational resources are optimized. * * *  
Data security and overfitting are critical considerations, with AWS S3 and IAM policies protecting data integrity. * * *  
Model deployment involves using AWS SageMaker for production deployment, ensuring scalability and performance. * * *
